hero.lead: I build web applications and services with a focus on quality, maintainability, and steady delivery. I blend deep .NET/SQL experience with React when the product calls for it.

panel.title: Delivery + maintainability
panel.b1: Web apps with clear module boundaries
panel.note: Built as a static site: fast, cheap to host, easy to iterate.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Professional summary, experience, and stack.
about.summaryP1: I hold a bachelor’s degree in Information Technology and have spent 20+ years building software in enterprise settings. My day-to-day work spans web apps, service integration (REST/SOAP), and databases—with an emphasis on clear design and reliable production operation.
about.summaryP2: I like working close to the business: turning requirements into incremental deliverables, improving performance when technical debt shows up, and leaving systems easy to evolve.
about.servicesSubtitle: Typical areas where I contribute the most value.

anses.body: Web applications for appointments, medical certificates, and administrative workflows, integrating services and SQL Server.

trueNorth.body: US client (IDValidation): evolving web apps and Azure-hosted APIs for financial data, focusing on consistency and traceability.

globant.body: YPF: Azure services for a Serviclub mobile app. AON: insurance quoting/sales applications integrating reporting and multiple business layers.

teletech.body: US client: call-center management systems and audio/video recording solutions with demanding operational requirements.

asignet.body: Clients such as YPF, Unilever, Santander, and HSBC: technical leadership on telephony rebilling, PBX/CRM integrations, and analytical reporting.

web.title: Web development
web.body: End-to-end delivery: modules, APIs, UI, and deployment.

services.title: Web services
services.body: REST/SOAP APIs integrating mobile, web, and legacy systems.

data.title: Data & performance
data.body: SQL modeling, query tuning, and pragmatic performance work.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Highlighted work and public references. Some enterprise work has no public demo due to confidentiality.

publicSectorWeb.title: Public-sector web apps (.NET)
publicSectorWeb.description: Web applications for citizen-facing workflows and internal administration, integrated with services and SQL Server.

fitShop.title: eCommerce (React)
fitShop.description: A training-gear shop: modern UI, clear navigation, and conversion-focused structure.

portfolioCodo.title: Portfolio (HTML + CSS)
portfolioCodo.description: A static portfolio from the Codo a Codo program: layout, components, and solid frontend fundamentals.

enterpriseWeb.title: Enterprise websites (.NET)
enterpriseWeb.description: Enterprise application evolution with multiple integrations, reporting, and operation in regulated contexts.

multiplePublisher.title: Mass publisher (.NET)
multiplePublisher.description: Tooling for bulk publishing and automated content/data flows using .NET and SQL Server.

reactSurveys.title: Surveys (React)
reactSurveys.description: Dynamic survey flows in React consuming REST services, focusing on UX and validation.
